title: Aphrodite products render result
description: Canonical Mise-facing worker output contract. Aphrodite emits this envelope (read-only) at GET /v1/jobs/{job_id}/renders. Mise sums cost_usd against its hard spend cap and persists provenance. One entry per produced render; a failed render produces no entry, so it contributes no cost.

source_asset_id.description: Opaque source asset id, or null. (The contract sketches an int; Aphrodite uses string ids and Mise maps them.)

spec.description: The render spec: an object of variant dimensions, or a string identifier.

output_path.description: Storage path of the produced artifact, or null when no artifact exists.

cost_usd.description: Real per-render spend in USD. Never negative; 0 for a free backend.

model.description: Render model / backend that produced the output.

rights_confirmed.description: Whether a human confirmed rights/consent for this render.
